post.description: Declare a new custom dimension based on an Elise custom field. Once declared, the data for the corresponding dimension can be calculated using the LoadCustomDimension method.
Delete the declaration and data of a custom dimension.

post.summary: Incremental loading of a custom dimension.
post.description: Incremental loading of custom dimension data from a pivot date.

post.summary: Incremental loading of all custom dimensions.
post.description: Incremental loading of all custom dimensions data from a pivot date.
General incremental loading of fact and dimension data. If the pivot date is not specified, the automatic pivot date corresponding to the incremental system is used.

A restart is required to enable OData to query the new custom dimensions (following their declaration). This is because the data model is cached when the AppBI service is started, to improve performance.
Delete all document facts for which there are no longer corresponding Elise documents.

post.summary: Purge values from a custom dimension.
post.description: Purge a custom dimension of values for which there is no longer a link to documented facts.

post.summary: Purge values from all custom dimensions.
post.description: Purge all custom dimensions of values for which there is no longer a link to documented facts.
Purge traces older than the number of days specified in the parameter.

customFieldCode.description: Custom dimension code corresponding to an Elise custom property of the form CP_xxxxxx. Must be unique.

CustomFieldType.description: Custom dimension data type according to the associated Elise property type.
